description: You are a library technician managing a digital media catalog database (Chinook) in LibreOffice Base. To optimize query performance, create three indexes: "idx_Track_Name" on the "Track" table's "Name" column; "idx_Track_Composer" on the "Track" table's "Composer" column; and a composite index "idx_Invoice_Cust_Date" on the "Invoice" table's "CustomerId" and "InvoiceDate" columns (in that order). Save the changes to the database file at /home/ga/chinook.odb.
